nodes.label: sanad-scanner.png
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Sanad legal app showing the 'Today' (اليوم) dashboard view with today's priorities for a lawyer user named Ahmed. Despite the filename referencing 'scanner', the active view is the daily priorities/home screen. Shows right sidebar navigation, role switcher, Arabic RTL UI, and PWA status.

nodes.label: Today's Priorities View
nodes.description: The home/today screen of the Sanad app displaying the lawyer's daily priorities. Shows a greeting, date, and a prioritized list of legal tasks such as following up on NDAs, confirming court hearings, reviewing labor law updates, preparing session files, and submitting VAT declarations. Ends with a 'Start Focus' CTA button.

example_tasks: متابعة توقيع اتفاقية السرية (Follow up NDA signing)
مراجعة تحديث قانون العمل (Review labor law update)
تقديم إقرار ضريبة القيمة المضافة (Submit VAT declaration)

nodes.label: Right Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: The main navigation panel on the right side of the Sanad app. Lists all major sections: Today, Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Documents, Document Scanner, Invoices, Compliance, Tasks, Deep Work, and Calendar. Some items display numeric badge counts (Compliance: 4, Tasks: 9). Also shows a PWA install hint and ⌘K shortcut.

nodes.label: Student / Lawyer Role Switcher
nodes.description: A toggle in the app header allowing switching between 'محامي' (Lawyer) and 'طالب' (Student) roles. Changes the app context and available features. Lawyer mode shows legal practice tools; Student mode likely shows educational features.

nodes.label: PWA Support
nodes.description: The Sanad app supports Progressive Web App (PWA) installation. The status bar shows 'PWA مفعّل' (PWA enabled) and 'محسّن للخادم المنزلي' (Optimized for home server). A sidebar hint prompts users to install it as a PWA for daily desktop access.

nodes.label: Document Scanner Navigation Entry
nodes.description: Navigation entry for the Document Scanner (ماسح المستندات) feature, visible in the right sidebar. The filename of this screenshot references 'scanner', possibly indicating this screenshot was taken to document scanner-related navigation or that the scanner view was nearby in the user's workflow.

nodes.label: Deep Work Feature
nodes.description: A 'العمل العميق' (Deep Work) feature visible in the sidebar navigation. Also referenced by the 'ابدأ تركيز' (Start Focus) CTA button on the today view, suggesting the today view can launch a focused deep-work session.

nodes.label: Compliance Feature
nodes.description: The 'الامتثال' (Compliance) section visible in the sidebar with a badge count of 4, indicating pending compliance items. Likely tracks regulatory deadlines and legal compliance tasks.

nodes.label: DashboardView Component
nodes.description: React component likely implementing the Dashboard/Today priorities home screen shown in this screenshot.

nodes.label: ScannerView Component
nodes.description: React component implementing the Document Scanner view referenced in the sidebar navigation and in this screenshot's filename.

nodes.label: DeepWorkView Component
nodes.description: React component for the Deep Work feature visible in sidebar navigation and triggered by the 'Start Focus' button.
